title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 266.450 - Law may be enforced by injunction
text:
266.450.  Law may be enforced by injunction. — In addition to the other remedies provided by law, the provisions of sections 266.410 to 266.460 may be enforced by injunction to restrain the feeding of garbage to swine in violation of sections 266.410 to 266.460 or the sale or transportation of swine fed in violation of sections 266.410 to 266.460.
(L. 1953 p. 6 § 6)
